## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / forwarding mode
- [ ] Docs / deployment
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] Updated `README.md` and `.env.example` if I added/changed a flag
- [ ] If this touches the wire protocol (`internal/proto`), I noted that all
      four programs must be rebuilt and redeployed together

## How was it tested end to end?

<!-- MiniTunnel has no unit tests; describe the relay/agent/client scenario you ran. -->
